title: Pistolochia nudicaulis
intro: Pistolochia nudicaulis, also known as Cunha's pistolochia, is a plant species belonging to the family Guttiferae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Bioactive constituents found in Pistolochia nudicaulis include flavonoids, tannins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which are used topically to treat various skin issues and wounds.
